summary: Completed testing of Dashboard Role Fix and Auto-Escalate Workflow Action. Backend: 11/13 tests passed (2 expected failures for role-restricted APIs). Frontend: All UI flows working correctly including Admin Dashboard display and Auto-Escalate action configuration in Workflow Editor.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login returns 'Administrator' role correctly
Backend: Dashboard stats API returns data for Administrator role (open_count, in_progress_count, etc.)
Backend: Orders API returns order list for dashboard
Backend: Workflow meta/actions API includes 'auto_escalate' action type
Backend: auto_escalate action has correct config fields (escalate_after_minutes, escalate_to_type, escalate_to_id, escalation_message)
Backend: All 9 expected action types present in workflow actions API
Backend: Create workflow with auto_escalate action saves correctly
Backend: Update workflow with auto_escalate action works correctly
Backend: Get workflow with auto_escalate action preserves config
Backend: Roles API returns roles for escalation targeting (includes Administrator)
Backend: Teams API returns teams for escalation targeting
Frontend: Dashboard displays 'Dashboard - Admin' title for Administrator role
Frontend: Dashboard shows 5 KPI cards (Open, In Progress, Pending Review, Delivered, SLA Breaching)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Recent Orders section with order cards
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Manage Users' button (admin-only feature)
Frontend: Workflow Editor shows 'Auto-Escalate on Breach' option in action dropdown
Frontend: Auto-Escalate config shows 'Escalate after (minutes)' input field
Frontend: Auto-Escalate config shows 'Escalate to' dropdown with Role/Team options
Frontend: Auto-Escalate config shows 'Escalation message' textarea with variable hints
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js: Role check correctly supports both old ('Admin') and new ('Administrator') role names at lines 635-639
workflows.py: get_workflow_actions() correctly includes auto_escalate with all required config fields
workflow_engine.py: execute_action() handles 'auto_escalate' action type with proper escalation logic including cooldown check and notification sending
WorkflowEditor.js: ActionNodeConfig component includes complete auto_escalate configuration UI with all required fields

success_rate.backend: 85% (11/13 tests passed - 2 expected failures for role-restricted APIs)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed workflows during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard role fix is working - Administrator role correctly displays Admin Dashboard with stats, KPI cards, and recent orders. Auto-Escalate workflow action is fully implemented: backend API returns action type with config fields, frontend Workflow Editor shows action in dropdown with complete configuration UI (escalate_after_minutes, escalate_to_type dropdown with Role/Team options, escalation_message textarea). Workflow engine handles auto_escalate action with escalation history creation and notification sending.

dashboard_role_fix.administrator_dashboard: WORKING - Shows 'Dashboard - Admin' title, 5 KPI cards, Recent Orders, Manage Users button
dashboard_role_fix.role_check_logic: WORKING - Dashboard.js checks for 'Administrator' and 'Admin' role names (lines 635-639)
dashboard_role_fix.dashboard_stats_api: WORKING - Returns open_count, in_progress_count, pending_count, delivered_count, sla_breaching_count

auto_escalate_workflow_action.backend_meta_api: WORKING - /api/workflows/meta/actions returns auto_escalate with correct config_fields
auto_escalate_workflow_action.frontend_action_dropdown: WORKING - 'Auto-Escalate on Breach' option visible in action dropdown
auto_escalate_workflow_action.config_ui_escalate_after_minutes: WORKING - Input field with default value 60
auto_escalate_workflow_action.workflow_create_with_auto_escalate: WORKING - Workflow saves with auto_escalate action config
auto_escalate_workflow_action.workflow_update_with_auto_escalate: WORKING - Workflow updates preserve auto_escalate config
auto_escalate_workflow_action.workflow_engine_execution: IMPLEMENTED - execute_action() handles auto_escalate with escalation_history creation and notifications

notes.expected_failures: Editor dashboard API (403) and Requester dashboard API (403) return permission errors for Administrator role - this is expected behavior as these APIs are role-restricted
